text: The Vision of the Flying Scroll

segments.text: Again I lifted up my eyes and saw before me a flying scroll.
What do you see?
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: asked the angel.
I see a flying scroll,
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: I replied,
twenty cubits long and ten cubits wide.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: Then he told me,

This is the curse that is going out over the face of all the land, for according to one side of the scroll, every thief will be removed; and according to the other side, every perjurer will be removed.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: I will send it out, declares the LORD of Hosts, and it will enter the house of the thief and the house of him who swears falsely by My name. It will remain inside his house and destroy it, down to its timbers and stones.
segments.speaker: The LORD of hosts

text: The Vision of the Woman in a Basket

segments.text: Then the angel who was speaking with me came forward and told me,
Now lift up your eyes and see what is approaching.
segments.speaker: the Angel

segments.text: What is it?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text:
I asked.
And he replied,
A measuring basket is going forth.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Then he continued,
This is their iniquity in all the land.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: And behold, the cover of lead was raised, and there was a woman sitting inside the basket.
This is Wickedness,
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: he said. And he shoved her down into the basket, pushing down the lead cover over its opening.
Then I lifted up my eyes and saw two women approaching, with the wind in their wings. Their wings were like those of a stork, and they lifted up the basket between heaven and earth.
Where are they taking the basket?
segments.speaker: Zechariah

segments.text: I asked the angel who was speaking with me.
To build a house for it in the land of Shinar,
segments.speaker: Angel

segments.text: he told me.
And when it is ready, the basket will be set there on its pedestal.
segments.speaker: Unknown
